variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 6197 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 6197 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 6197 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 6197 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 148.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 49.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 26.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 38.0 mm
